author_format.format: First Middle Last (no degrees or titles)

heading.format: centered, bold, not italic, title case

keywords.position: new line below abstract, indent 0.5 inch

level3.format: Left Aligned, Bold Italic, Title Case

level4.format: Indented 0.5 inch, Bold, Title Case, ends with period, text continues on same line

level5.format: Indented 0.5 inch, Bold Italic, Title Case, ends with period, text continues on same line

three_or_more_authors.note: et al. always has a period after 'al'

direct_quote.short_quote: under 40 words — in quotation marks in text
direct_quote.long_quote: 40+ words — block quote, indent 0.5 inch, no quotes

common_errors_to_fix: Missing comma between author and year
Missing period after 'al' in et al.
et al. used for only 1 or 2 authors
Author last name misspelled or wrong order

indent.description: First line flush left, subsequent lines indented 0.5 inch

reference_page.spacing: double spaced, no extra space between entries

single_author_book.format: Author, A. A. (Year). Title of book in sentence case. Publisher.
single_author_book.example: Smith, J. A. (2020). The science of learning. Academic Press.

two_author_book.format: Author, A. A., & Author, B. B. (Year). Title of book. Publisher.
two_author_book.example: Smith, J. A., & Jones, B. C. (2019). Research methods. Wiley.

three_plus_author_book.format: Author, A. A., Author, B. B., & Author, C. C. (Year). Title. Publisher.
three_plus_author_book.note: List up to 20 authors. For 21+, list first 19, ..., last author

journal_article.format: Author, A. A. (Year). Title of article in sentence case. Journal Name in Title Case, Volume(Issue), Pages. https://doi.org/xxxxx
journal_article.example: Smith, J. A. (2020). Effects of social media on youth. Journal of Communication, 45(3), 112–130. https://doi.org/10.1234/jc.2020.45

website.format: Author, A. A. (Year, Month Day). Title of page. Website Name. URL
website.example: Smith, J. (2021, March 5). Digital literacy in schools. Education Today. https://www.educationtoday.com/article

edited_book_chapter.format: Author, A. A. (Year). Title of chapter. In E. Editor (Ed.), Title of book (pp. xx–xx). Publisher.

common_mistakes: Using 'Works Cited' instead of 'References'
Not double-spacing reference entries
No hanging indent in references
Using first names instead of initials in references
Missing year in parentheses in references
No comma after author last name in references
Capitalizing all words in article/book titles (use sentence case for titles, title case for journals)
Missing DOI or URL for online sources
Using 'p.' for page numbers in citations without direct quotes
Running head on student papers (not required in APA 7th)
No abstract when one is expected
Keywords not italicized
First-line indent in abstract
Headings not bold
Level 2 headings centered instead of left-aligned

always_fix: Apply Times New Roman 12pt to all text
Apply double spacing to all paragraphs
Level-1 headings: centered, bold, title case
Level-2 headings: left, bold, title case
Level-3 headings: left, bold italic, title case
Fix bare citations missing parentheses: Smith 2018 → (Smith, 2018)
Fix 'and' to '&' in parenthetical two-author citations
Fix et al without period: et al 2017 → et al., 2017
Format bare reference entries to APA Author, I. (Year). Title.
Split multiple references jammed into one paragraph
Separate inline keywords from abstract body
Normalise doi: prefix to https://doi.org/ in reference entries
flag_for_review: Apparent typos in text (e.g. 'Tee' in running text)
Missing page numbers for direct quotes
Reference entries where journal/publisher info is missing
Citations in text with no matching reference entry

first_page_header.format: left aligned, each on own line

title.format: title case, not bold, not italic, not underlined

headings.note: MLA does not prescribe specific heading levels — use consistently

level2.format: Bold Italic, Title Case, Left Aligned

single_author.note: No comma between author and page

heading.format: centered, not bold, not italic, title case

book.format: Author LastName, FirstName. Title of Book. Publisher, Year.
book.example: Smith, John. The Art of Writing. Penguin, 2020.

journal_article.format: Author LastName, FirstName. "Article Title." Journal Name, vol. X, no. X, Year, pp. XX-XX.
journal_article.example: Smith, John. "Digital Communication." Media Studies, vol. 12, no. 3, 2020, pp. 45–67.

website.format: Author LastName, FirstName. "Page Title." Website Name, Publisher, Date, URL.
website.example: Smith, John. "AI in Education." Tech Today, Google, 5 Mar. 2021, www.techtoday.com/ai.

edited_book_chapter.format: Author LastName, FirstName. "Chapter Title." Book Title, edited by Editor Name, Publisher, Year, pp. XX-XX.

common_mistakes: Using 'References' instead of 'Works Cited'
Adding comma between author and page number in citation
Using year instead of page number in citation
Forgetting quotation marks around article titles
Italicizing article titles (should be quotation marks)
Not italicizing book and journal titles
Capitalizing all words in website page titles
Missing hanging indent
Not abbreviating months in Works Cited

truncation_flags: Paragraph ends without punctuation and last word < 4 characters
